todos.content: Assess capabilities and read matching skill files

Call web_agent to find top 5 most-read articles on https://thamalu.blogspot.com/, visit each, create summaries, and write deliverables to /_outputs/blog_task_output/ (report.md, article_1.md ... article_5.md, overall_summary.md)
Render the produced files with render_files
Cleanup intermediate scratch files if any
